name: An unfinished room
description:
You stand in a dim room that appears to be surprisingly decrepid for part of
such a new building.  It seems doubtful that anyone actually showers here, as
you'd probably only get more dirty attempting to.  As you peer through what
little light there is, you notice a loose grate in the far corner.  Letting
curiosity get the best of you, you lift up the grate and find a long ladder
descending into darkness.
